span.p: More than one small app, or any prod data?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
One account, tag well, set a budget alarm
revisit BEFORE prod data lands

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Want AWS to manage the guardrails + account vending?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AWS Control Tower
landing zone + guardrails + Account Factory + log-archive/audit accounts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Organizations + hand-rolled SCPs + delegated admin
you own the guardrail maintenance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Guardrails + dedicated security/log-archive accounts in place?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Enroll into Control Tower
or add Control Tower to the existing org

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Add SCP guardrails + a security/log-archive account by hand

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Vend new accounts by blast radius
prod / non-prod / security / shared-services-network per workload

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Isolate regulated workloads in their own account/OU
region-pin + SCP region lock + dedicated CloudTrail
